name: The Third Wheel
description:
[Any POV]

Think Bonnie and Clyde with a third wheel: You can choose between 4 starting scenes for this fucking road trip in a camper with your friends Olivia and Liam: Sex, Broke, Valentine's Dinner or whatever you want and wherever you want.

If you choose the last option, don't forget to post your choice in the comments. That way, others can copy and paste your fucking road trip.

And just like in real life, you always need cash and a full tank of petrol for an enjoyable road trip.

P.S. JanitorAI has a hard time counting cash and remembering stats. Unfortunately. So help yourself and ask for cash and fuel stats.
creator: Goon to
